prompt: The glucometer character leans forward and points accusingly at the viewer, its screen-face eyes narrowing and its display flickering as it scolds. Camera: slow push-in to its screen-face. negative_prompt: deformed, creepy, extra limbs, melted, distorted text, watermark, logo, blurry, camera spinning, floating, realistic human

The glucometer's screen flashes '340' angrily while hard sugar scale crusts along the cartoon veins behind it. Camera: slow push-in. negative_prompt: deformed, creepy, gore, distorted text, watermark, logo, blurry, camera spinning, floating, realistic human

The exhausted man drags himself up rubbing his face while the glucometer watches him judgmentally from the nightstand. Camera: slow push-in. negative_prompt: deformed face, extra fingers, creepy, distorted text, watermark, logo, blurry, camera spinning, floating

The glowing cartoon nerve wires buzz and flicker out one by one as the tingle sparkles fade. Camera: slow push-in to a flickering nerve. negative_prompt: realistic anatomy, gore, creepy, deformed, x-ray, distorted text, watermark, logo, blurry, camera spinning, floating

The glucometer shows '200' while the two cartoon kidneys get coated and clogged with sugar, straining. Camera: slow push-in. negative_prompt: realistic organ, gore, creepy, deformed, distorted text, watermark, logo, blurry, camera spinning, floating
